name: WhatsApp Business
description: Connect to WhatsApp Business (Meta Cloud API) to sync message templates and phone number data.

install_fields.label: Phone Number ID
install_fields.description: WhatsApp Business phone number ID from Meta Business Suite.

install_fields.label: System User Access Token
install_fields.description: Meta System User permanent access token with whatsapp_business_management permission.

install_fields.label: WhatsApp Business Account ID
install_fields.description: WhatsApp Business Account (WABA) ID from Meta Business Suite.

apis.name: Sync
apis.description: Sync all WhatsApp message templates to the knowledge base.

apis.name: List Templates
apis.description: Return all templates for the WABA following cursor pagination.

apis.name: Get Template
apis.description: Fetch a single message template by its Meta ID.

apis.name: List Phone Numbers
apis.description: Return all phone numbers registered to the WABA.
